zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth於1438年出生在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯時，他的父親William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby66歲，母親Philippa Clifford67歲。他於大約1438年與Lady Anne de Hastings在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年8月20日在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth于1438年出生在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯时，他的父亲William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby66岁，母亲Philippa Clifford67岁。他于大约1438年与Lady Anne de Hastings在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年8月20日在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth was born in 1438, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, his father, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, was 66 and his mother, Philippa Clifford, was 67. He married Lady Anne de Hastings about 1438, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 20 August 1498, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth est né en 1438, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Philippa Clifford, avait 67 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne de Hastings environ 1438, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 août 1498, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth 1438 in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby 66 und seine Mutter Philippa Clifford 67. Er hat um 1438 in England, United Kingdom Lady Anne de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. August 1498 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth è nato il nel 1438 nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Clifford, aveva 67 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne de Hastings circa 1438, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 agosto 1498, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworthが1438年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで生まれた時，父William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Grobyは66歳，母Philippa Cliffordは67歳であった。約1438年にイギリスイギリスでLady Anne de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年8月20日に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth(이)가 1438년 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Clifford(은)는 67세였다. 그는 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Anne de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 8월 20일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에 묻혔다.

mn.St. Editha Churchyard, Tamworth, Staffor: Tamworth, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United: Tamworth, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth nasceu em 1438, em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Clifford, tinha 67 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne de Hastings aproximadamente 1438, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1498, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth родился в 1438 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Clifford, 67. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne de Hastings около 1438 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 августа 1498 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth nació en 1438, en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Philippa Clifford, tenía 67 años. Se casó con Lady Anne de Hastings aproximadamente 1438, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1498, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
